name: Non-consented source to consented sink
description: Transfer from non-consented user to consented user. Should find path because consent rules only restrict when SOURCE has consent enabled. The receiver's consent status does not affect incoming transfers.
notes: E2E re-enabled after demurrage safety margin fix (A1)-adjusted balance mismatch. Pathfinder uses stored raw balances but on-chain has demurrage-decayed values.
